name: Calendar Control — Multi-Role Enforcement

nodes.name: Hourly Cron
nodes.notes: Fires every hour. Per Writings/Multi_Role_Calendar_Setup_20260421.md: runs audit of current-role-block integrity + upcoming-24h meeting filter.

_comment: Calendar Control Multi-Role Enforcement Workflow. Polls both role calendars hourly, merges events, detects violations (cross-role contamination / deep-work intrusion / back-to-back < 15min gap), and notifies Clay via ntfy.sh if any found. Per Writings/Multi_Role_Calendar_Setup_20260421.md and Writings/Operating_Stack_v1_4_L15_Delta_20260421.md. Activation: import into n8n; create role OAuth credentials; set env vars (JOBA_CALENDAR_ID / JOBB_CALENDAR_ID / NTFY_TOPIC); enable. Single-role operation: disable Job B branch.
